completed_tasks.name: Created fresh branch codex/go-live-v1.6-production-launch from origin/main after PR #73 landed.
Started milestone v1.6 Production Launch Execution in PROJECT.md and STATE.md.
Defined v1.6 requirements for AWS launch execution, Snowflake native pull, MDM, hosted graph, dashboard UAT, operations, security, and AWS-only scope.
Created v1.6 roadmap with 6 phases, 11 plans, and 12/12 requirements mapped.

remaining_tasks.name: Prod Terraform apply and passive infrastructure evidence capture.
Active AWS application deploy, infra/aws-prod-application.json presence or summary evidence, and launch gate matrix update.
Execute production Snowflake, MDM secrets/connectivity, hosted graph E2E, dashboard UAT, and final GO decision phases in roadmap order.

human_actions_pending.action: AWS operator approval and credentials for Phase 6 production infrastructure and application deploy.
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 6 starts the actual production launch execution sequence.

human_actions_pending.action: Later Snowflake, MDM, dashboard reviewer, release owner, and security or isolation approvals as required by Phases 7-11.
human_actions_pending.context: The v1.6 roadmap requires owner sign-off before the go/no-go packet can flip to GO.

decisions.rationale: The milestone exists to flip the v1.5 NO-GO - Conditional decision to GO only after all blocker themes have PASS evidence and sign-off.
User selected the skip-research path; v1.6 should execute existing runbooks and gates rather than introduce new architecture.

decisions.decision: Continue phase numbering from v1.5, starting with Phase 6.
decisions.rationale: Archived v1.5 roadmap, requirements, evidence, and go/no-go packet link to Phases 1-5 and must remain stable.

decisions.decision: Preserve all v1.5 phase evidence and milestone archives.
decisions.rationale: Do not run phase-clearing cleanup because existing archives and evidence are required for launch traceability.

decisions.decision: Keep AWS-only architecture and secret-safety contract.
decisions.rationale: No non-AWS deployment paths, registries, storage targets, workflow engines, or secret-management systems are authorized; no DSNs, tokens, passwords, Terraform state, raw connector traces, raw Native App logs, or sensitive generated JSON may be committed.

context_notes: Milestone v1.6 initialization is complete on branch codex/go-live-v1.6-production-launch. The branch has three planning commits on top of origin/main before the pause/handoff commit and has not been pushed. Worktree was clean before pause artifacts. Root checkout /Users/aneenaananth/projects/edgartools-platform has an unrelated uncommitted TODOS.md change; do not touch it. The roadmap is approved and Phase 6 is next.
